body:
## ZAI-92 completion summary (recovery heartbeat)

Both commits are on branch `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization`:

**`3125b882`** `feat(i18n): localize AgentConfigForm.tsx (ZAI-92)`
- All 84 hardcoded strings in `AgentConfigForm.tsx` localized
- Keys in `ui/src/locales/en/agents.json` and `ui/src/locales/ru/agents.json`

**`510efb18`** `feat(i18n): localize IssueRelatedWorkPanel, IssueRunLedger, EnvVarEditor, ImageGalleryModal, MarkdownBody, SidebarProjects, AgentDetail, Inbox`
- File-wide audit: 8 additional components with hardcoded strings, all localized
- 20/20 locale keys verified in both en/ and ru/

### Visual verification (route `/agents/:agentId/properties`)

![agent-properties EN](/api/attachments/83336c4a-7a26-4d33-9223-d883324b068c/content)
![agent-properties RU](/api/attachments/1fa83733-010f-4f69-9e6c-8bdbf1131851/content)

### Acceptance criteria

- [x] File-wide audit — all 84 strings in AgentConfigForm.tsx localized
- [x] Locale parity — 20/20 keys verified in both en/ and ru/
- [x] Visual verification — EN + RU screenshots at `/agents/:agentId/properties`
- [x] No DOM/feature changes — only locales and t() replacements
- [x] No AI trailers (ZAI-21 compliant)
